name: ralplan-eab-full-audit
description: Execute 8-category remediation plan for enhanced_agent_bus per .omc/plans/ralplan-eab-full-audit.md. Execution order (safest-first): Cat 1 → Cat 7 → Cat 8 → Cat 2 → Cat 3 → Cat 4 → Cat 5 → Cat 6.

stories.title: Cat 1: Add test coverage for 5 zero-test subsystems
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test__compat_coverage.py exists and all tests pass
tests/test_adaptive_governance_coverage.py exists and all tests pass
tests/test_agent_health_coverage.py exists and all tests pass
tests/test_circuit_breaker_coverage.py exists and all tests pass
tests/test_opa_client_coverage.py exists and all tests pass
Each new test file covers at least 3 meaningful assertions (not smoke-only)

pytest tests/test__compat_coverage.py tests/test_adaptive_governance_coverage.py tests/test_agent_health_coverage.py tests/test_circuit_breaker_coverage.py tests/test_opa_client_coverage.py -v returns exit 0

stories.title: Cat 7: LLM adapter conformance (remove mypy override line + add 8-test conformance file)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_llm_adapter_conformance.py exists with 8 tests (7 adapter subclass + 1 abstract)
Tests cover BedrockAdapter, AnthropicAdapter, OpenAIAdapter, AzureOpenAIAdapter, HuggingFaceAdapter, OpenClawAdapter, XAIAdapter, and BaseLLMAdapter.isabstract
pyproject.toml: ONLY the 'enhanced_agent_bus.llm_adapters.*' line removed from the combined [[tool.mypy.overrides]] block; all other entries remain
pytest tests/test_llm_adapter_conformance.py -v returns exit 0 with 8 passed
mypy enhanced_agent_bus/llm_adapters/ --no-error-summary returns 0 errors

stories.title: Cat 8: OPA fail-closed timeout test
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_opa_fail_closed.py includes a timeout test that mocks OPA and asserts check_agent_authorization() returns False on timeout
grep for return True inside check_agent_authorization() and evaluate_policy() functions in opa_client/core.py returns 0 hits
Management methods (load_policy, load_bundle_from_url, _rollback_to_lkg) remain unchanged
pytest tests/test_opa_fail_closed.py -v returns exit 0
stories.note: Tests placed in new test_opa_fail_closed.py (not test_opa_client_coverage.py) because existing file is env-gated with skipif; fail-closed security invariants must run unconditionally.

stories.title: Cat 2: Lift 3 grandfathered mypy overrides
acceptanceCriteria: _ext_pqc.py has type annotations on all public functions (TYPE_CHECKING-guarded stubs with # type: ignore[assignment] where needed)
_ext_decision_store.py has type annotations on all public functions
deliberation_layer/*.py (excluding dashboard.py, impact_scorer.py, __init__.py) have type annotations
pyproject.toml: 'enhanced_agent_bus._ext_*' glob replaced with explicit 16-entry list (18 _ext_* files minus _ext_pqc and _ext_decision_store)
pyproject.toml: 'enhanced_agent_bus.deliberation_layer.*' entry removed from override block
mypy enhanced_agent_bus/_ext_pqc.py enhanced_agent_bus/_ext_decision_store.py enhanced_agent_bus/deliberation_layer/ --disallow-untyped-defs returns 0 errors

stories.title: Cat 3: Harden fallback_stubs.py slowapi
acceptanceCriteria: StubLimiter.__init__ in fallback_stubs.py calls require_dependency('slowapi', available=False) when IS_PRODUCTION is True
tests/test_fallback_stubs_production.py exists with test that uses monkeypatch.setattr(fs, 'IS_PRODUCTION', True) + fs.StubLimiter() + pytest.raises(DependencyNotAvailableError)
pytest tests/test_fallback_stubs_production.py -v returns exit 0

stories.title: Cat 4: Extension registry entries for all 18 _ext_* modules
acceptanceCriteria: plugin_registry.py registers all 18 _ext_* modules using find_spec() (not import_module)
Each entry has a name, module path, and availability check via find_spec
tests/test_plugin_registry_ext.py covers registration and .get() behavior for at least 3 entries
pytest tests/test_plugin_registry_ext.py -v returns exit 0

stories.title: Cat 5: Split message_processor.py into message_processor/ package
acceptanceCriteria: git tag pre-cat5-split created as rollback checkpoint before starting
message_processor.py (file) DELETED
message_processor/ directory created with __init__.py that re-exports MessageProcessor as a shim
Methods split into submodules per the plan's method-to-submodule mapping table
python -c 'from enhanced_agent_bus.message_processor import MessageProcessor' succeeds
tests/conftest.py at line 264 bare import still works
pytest -k message_processor -v returns exit 0 with no regressions

stories.title: Cat 6: Split routes/tenants.py into routes/tenants/ package
acceptanceCriteria: git tag pre-cat6-split created as rollback checkpoint before starting
OpenAPI schema snapshot saved to /tmp/pre_split_schema.json before starting
routes/tenants.py (file) DELETED
routes/tenants/ directory contains: __init__.py, _shared.py, crud.py, lifecycle.py, quota.py, hierarchy.py
__init__.py aggregator uses APIRouter(prefix='/api/v1/tenants', tags=['Tenant Management'])
Sub-routers use APIRouter() with no prefix
crud.py contains endpoints from lines 720-997 (CRUD Operations)
lifecycle.py contains endpoints from lines 999-1139 (Lifecycle Management)
quota.py contains endpoints from lines 1141-1351 (Quota Management)
hierarchy.py contains endpoints from lines 1353-end (Hierarchy Management)
python -c 'from enhanced_agent_bus.routes.tenants import router' succeeds
OpenAPI schema diff (post vs pre) shows zero changes for /api/v1/tenants/* routes
pytest -k tenant -v returns exit 0 with no regressions
